author: The Canons of the Synods of Sardica, Carthage, Constantinople, and Carthage Under St. Cyprian, Which Canons Were Received by the Council in Trullo and Ratified by II. Nice
book: The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.

classification.cautionReason: Conciliar or creedal material received in mainstream Nicene Christian tradition, with denominational differences on some canons.

lineage: The Canons of the Synods of Sardica, Carthage, Constantinople, and Carthage Under St. Cyprian, Which Canons Were Received by the Council in Trullo and Ratified by II. Nice.
The Canons of the CCXVII Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage. Commonly Called The Code of Canons of the African Church.
The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.

metadata.author: The Canons of the Synods of Sardica, Carthage, Constantinople, and Carthage Under St. Cyprian, Which Canons Were Received by the Council in Trullo and Ratified by II. Nice

title: Canon XLV.

verses.book: The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.
The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.
verses.text: Concerning those who are sick and cannot answer for themselves.

verses.book: The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.
verses.text: That the sick are to be baptized who cannot answer for themselves if their [servants] shall have spoken at their own proper peril a testimony of the good will [of the sick man].

verses.book: The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.
verses.text: Concerning players who are doing penance and are converted to the Lord.

verses.book: The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.
verses.text: That to players and actors and other persons of that kind, as also to apostates when they are converted and return to God, grace or reconciliation is not to be denied.

verses.book: The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.
The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.
verses.text: That he who cannot answer for himself on account of illness is to be baptized when he shall have given evidence of his desire.

verses.book: The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.
verses.text: A repentant actor is to be received to penance.

verses.book: The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.
verses.text: This canon is made up of Canons xxxij. and xxxiij. of the Synod of Hippo, a.d.

verses.book: The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.
verses.text: “Apostates,” i.e., those who elsewhere are called Lapsi; those who had done sacrifice through the violence of torment in time of persecution, professing in the meantime that their consciences did not consent to what their hands did.
